title: Trump Criticized Canada's China EV Deal—Elon Musk's Tesla Could Be Among Its Biggest Winners
full_text: Tesla Inc. could be reaping the benefits of the China-Canada EV agreement despite earlier criticism from President Donald Trump following the deal. Tesla Accounts For More Than 10% Of Chinese Imports According to a report by Drive Tesla Canada on...
